issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. The effect allows adding 1 card FROM Life cards TO hand, which is FlipLife. However, the second part ('Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards') requires a separate action to return a card to Life cards. FlipLife should only handle the first part (taking from Life to hand).
TrashFromHand is incorrect. The effect adds a card to the top of Life cards, not trash. Should use AttachDon or a Life-specific action. TrashFromHand discards to trash, which is wrong.

Missing condition logic: 'You may' indicates optional choice between taking from Life or adding to Life. Current DSL executes both actions sequentially without presenting a choice. Should structure as conditional branching or separate optional actions.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards.
